item.title: Another of Trump's Security Risk Dingbats
item.description: https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5258857-dhs-secretary-noem-purse-stolen/ No worries, I'm sure it was just China, or Russia, or Iran that just stole THE top level badge at DHS so that they can reverse engineer it and build a master key device. These people are so glaringly unqualified for their positions that it boggles the mind.

item.title: 17-year-old kid in Australia, named Gout Gout, who has run 100m in 9.99 seconds, and 200m in 19.84 seconds. He is considered to have as much potential as Usain Bolt, and will probably be an Olympic champion one day.
item.dc:creator: Rahmur77

item.title: Pregnant dog was dumped just outside of town. Luck Rescue rescued her and left her with a foster and she gave birth the same day!
item.description: Huge thanks to Audrey at Lucks Rescue, @rescue_with_me_, for rescuing Ginger and her pups!

item.title: Litterbox Action Figure [OC]
item.description: Thought I'd take a break from memes to hop on the new art challenge of to drawing your character as an action figure -problem is, now I want one! What phrases do you think she'd say?

.
.
.
.
.
.

.
.
ouch
.
.
.
